name: Deploy Log
description: Console/terminal output viewer for deployment logs, build output, and CLI traces. Monospace font with color-coded severity levels.

live.description: Streaming deploy log with status badge and auto-scroll. Shows real-time build/deploy output with severity-colored lines.

slots.header: Title bar with deploy name, status Badge (building/success/failed), and timestamp
slots.log-area: Monospace scrollable area with color-coded log lines (info=muted, warn=warning, error=error)
slots.footer: Action bar with Clear and Download buttons

history.description: Searchable deploy history log with filtering by severity and text search.

slots.log-area: Filterable monospace log entries with timestamps and severity badges
slots.pagination: Log entry count and page controls

slots.header: Title bar with deploy name, status badge, and timestamp
slots.log-area: Monospace scrollable area with color-coded log lines
